targets.rawSql: SELECT weight_kg AS value FROM body_metrics WHERE weight_kg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY measured_at DESC LIMIT 1

WITH params AS (SELECT regr_slope(weight_kg, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM measured_at::timestamptz)) AS slope, regr_intercept(weight_kg, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM measured_at::timestamptz)) AS intercept FROM body_metrics WHERE weight_kg IS NOT NULL AND measured_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days') SELECT ROUND((intercept + slope * EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '3 months')::timestamptz))::numeric, 1) AS value FROM params

WITH params AS (SELECT regr_slope(weight_kg, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM measured_at::timestamptz)) AS slope, regr_intercept(weight_kg, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM measured_at::timestamptz)) AS intercept FROM body_metrics WHERE weight_kg IS NOT NULL AND measured_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days') SELECT ROUND((intercept + slope * EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '6 months')::timestamptz))::numeric, 1) AS value FROM params
SELECT ROUND((weight_kg / (1.78 * 1.78))::numeric, 1) AS value FROM body_metrics WHERE weight_kg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY measured_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT ROUND((MAX(weight_kg) - MIN(weight_kg))::numeric, 1) AS value FROM body_metrics WHERE weight_kg IS NOT NULL
SELECT resting_hr_bpm AS value FROM resting_hr_daily ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT measured_at::timestamptz AS time, weight_kg AS "Weight" FROM body_metrics WHERE weight_kg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY measured_at

SELECT measured_at::timestamptz AS time, ROUND(AVG(weight_kg) OVER (ORDER BY measured_at ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)::numeric, 2) AS "7-day Avg" FROM body_metrics WHERE weight_kg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY measured_at

WITH params AS (SELECT regr_slope(weight_kg, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM measured_at::timestamptz)) AS slope, regr_intercept(weight_kg, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM measured_at::timestamptz)) AS intercept FROM body_metrics WHERE weight_kg IS NOT NULL AND measured_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days'), dates AS (SELECT generate_series(CURRENT_DATE, CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '6 months', INTERVAL '7 days')::date AS d) SELECT d AS time, ROUND((intercept + slope * EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM d::timestamptz))::numeric, 1) AS "Projection" FROM dates, params ORDER BY d
SELECT measured_at::timestamptz AS time, body_fat_pct AS "Body Fat %" FROM body_metrics WHERE body_fat_pct IS NOT NULL ORDER BY measured_at
SELECT date::timestamptz AS time, resting_hr_bpm AS "Resting HR" FROM resting_hr_daily ORDER BY date

SELECT TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', measured_at), 'YYYY-MM') AS "Month", ROUND(AVG(weight_kg)::numeric,1) AS "Avg Weight (kg)", ROUND(MIN(weight_kg)::numeric,1) AS "Min", ROUND(MAX(weight_kg)::numeric,1) AS "Max", ROUND(AVG(body_fat_pct)::numeric,1) AS "Avg Body Fat %", ROUND(AVG(weight_kg / (1.78 * 1.78))::numeric,1) AS "Avg BMI" FROM body_metrics WHERE weight_kg IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 24
